message:
feat(tui): context-aware help panels with per-screen tips and section reordering (br-1xt0m.1.4.2)

Add context_help_tip() trait method to MailScreen returning screen-specific
guidance. Help overlay now shows screen-specific section first (most
contextual), then global, then navigation. Each section can carry an
optional description rendered in italic below its title. All 14 screens
provide concise tips describing their purpose and key interactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
